foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Burns cause massive fluid shifts and third-spacing; Parkland formula-based fluid resuscitation requires understanding of fluid compartment physiology

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Burn wound management depends on understanding healing phases, granulation tissue formation, and factors affecting graft take

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Major burns cause hypovolemic and distributive shock from capillary leak syndrome requiring aggressive early fluid resuscitation

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Burn wound sepsis (Pseudomonas, MRSA, fungal) is the leading cause of late mortality in burn patients

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Chronic burn scars can undergo malignant transformation to squamous cell carcinoma (Marjolin's ulcer)

objectives: SU4.1: Elicit, document and present history in a case of Burns and perform
SU4.2: Describe Clinical features, Diagnose type and extent of burns and
SU4.3: Discuss the Medicolegal aspects in burn injuries.
SU4.4: Communicate and counsel patients and families on the outcome A /C
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Burns across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
